news.headline: Duck® Brand Stuck at Prom® Scholarship Contest celebrates 25 years, offers cash prizes since 2001. #TeenCreativityInMillis
news.summary: Over the past 25 years, nearly 8,500 high school students have participated in the Duck® Brand Stuck at Prom® Scholarship Contest, where they have the opportunity to showcase their creativity and win cash prizes. Taking place since 2001, the contest invites students to design prom attire using Duck Tape®. This year, students from AVON, Ohio, can join the competition as well.

news.headline: Class 1 Nickel updates resource estimate for Dundonald North Nickel Sulphide Deposit, highlighting significant tonnage and grade. Covering 3,093 hectares, the Alexo-Dundonald Nickel Sulphide Project is about 45 km northeast of Timmins, Ontario.
news.summary: Toronto, March 27, 2025 - Class 1 Nickel and Technologies Ltd. (CSE: NICO | OTCQB: NICLF) have unveiled the updated mineral resource estimate for the Dundonald North Nickel Sulphide Deposit as part of the Alexo-Dundonald Nickel Sulphide Project in Ontario. The D-N Deposit is one of 4 nickel sulphide deposits in the Project, spanning 3,093 hectares. Located 45 km northeast of Timmins, the mining center of Ontario, the Project has been a focus for the Company over the last two years. This effort highlights Class 1 Nickel's dedication to developing a strong portfolio of nickel sulphide resources in a prime Canadian mining area.

news.headline: Trump's 25% tariff could raise imported car prices by $5,000-$15,000. US-assembled cars also affected, expected to rise.
news.summary: After President Donald Trump implemented a new 25% tariff on imported autos and specific parts starting on April 3, U.S. consumers may see a significant increase in prices when purchasing a vehicle. Analysts predict that the tariff could lead to price hikes ranging from $5,000 to $15,000, depending on the model and country of origin. This price increase would affect vehicles priced between $20,000 and $60,000, impacting a substantial portion of the U.S. auto market. Even U.S.-assembled vehicles, which rely heavily on foreign components, would not be immune to the tariff's effects. The tariffs on foreign-made parts could further escalate the cost of a domestically built vehicle. This move is anticipated to disrupt auto demand and alter the competitive landscape within the U.S. automotive industry significantly.

news.headline: Duke Energy Florida donates $75,000 to Habitat for Humanity, totaling over $200,000 since 2020. Employees volunteer to build homes.
news.summary: Three Habitat for Humanity affiliate organizations have been given grants as part of affordable housing investments totaling over $200,000 in Florida since 2020. Duke Energy Florida employees are actively participating in the construction of homes in Citrus and Orange counties. The contributions and volunteer efforts highlight a commitment to community development and addressing housing needs in the region. The news was announced in St. Petersburg, Florida, on March 27, 2025.

news.headline: JuCoin and Raffles Capital partner for RWA Global Chapter launch at Shenzhen Digital Economy Forum. Successful event in Singapore's Raffles Capital.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, the "Enterprise Globalization Forum in the Digital Economy Era and Global Launch of 'RWA Wealth Disruption'" wrapped up in Shenzhen after being anxiously awaited. The event was a collaboration between Raffles Capital from Singapore and Coinut Pte. Important discussions and insights were shared, marking an important moment in the intersection of business and technology.

news.headline: T. Rowe Price adds two new active equity ETFs - Capital Appreciation Premium Income ETF and Hedged Equity ETF - began trading on NYSE today.
news.summary: Today, two new active transparent equity exchange-traded funds, the Capital Appreciation Premium Income ETF and Hedged Equity ETF, started trading on the New York Stock Exchange. This announcement was made by T. Rowe Price, a prominent global investment management firm. The company's ticker symbol is TROW on the NASDAQ-GS. This move represents a significant addition to their offerings in the ETF market.

news.headline: High-end tobacco packaging market to reach $25.8 billion by 2032, growing at 4.5% CAGR, driven by consumer demand and sustainability.
news.summary: The high-end tobacco packaging market is experiencing significant growth due to a surging consumer interest in premium tobacco products, brand differentiation tactics, and the growing use of eco-friendly packaging materials. Manufacturers are prioritizing unique designs, top-notch finishes, and upscale packaging structures to cater to this trend. This market expansion is underscored by the increasing preference for luxury tobacco products, with global sales projected to reach $X billion by 2025. The shift towards sustainable materials represents a key trend, driving companies to invest in environmentally friendly packaging solutions to align with consumer preferences and regulatory standards. In response, the industry is witnessing a wave of innovative packaging technologies and materials aimed at enhancing the product appeal and environmental footprint of high-end tobacco packaging.

news.headline: TotalEnergies strengthens emissions reduction targets, publishes Sustainability & Climate - 2025 Progress Report.
news.summary: In Paris, TotalEnergies has released its Sustainability & Climate - 2025 Progress Report detailing the advancements in its transition strategy. The report, an addition to the sustainability report to be included in the Universal Registration Document as per CSRD regulations, illustrates the company's integrated and balanced multi-energy approach. By 2024, TotalEnergies witnessed the benefits of this strategy that merges profitable growth with sustainability. TotalEnergies is listed on the Paris, London, and New York Stock Exchanges under the tickers TTE.

news.headline: Ripple partners with Chipper Cash for faster and cheaper African remittances, targeting increased efficiency and growth. Blockchain tech is key.
news.summary: Ripple has partnered with Chipper Cash, an African payment infrastructure provider, to support crypto-enabled cross-border payments. As part of the deal announced on March 27, Chipper Cash will utilize Ripple Payments for its transactions, aiming to offer faster, cheaper, and more efficient settlements. The collaboration signifies Ripple's expansion in the Middle East and Africa. Blockchain adoption is growing in Africa, particularly in remittance and payment sectors, with stablecoins making up nearly half of all transaction volume in Sub-Saharan Africa. The integration of Ripple's technology into Chipper Cash’s platform aims to drive economic growth and innovation across the markets they serve. Chipper Cash co-founder noted that crypto-enabled payments can lead to greater financial inclusion, accelerated access to global markets, and empowerment of businesses and individuals in Africa. Ripple's recent licensing in Dubai and legal win against the SEC suggest the firm's forward momentum. The partnership builds on Ripple's Onafriq deal, enabling payments between 27 African countries, Australia, the UK, and the GCC. Ripple and Chipper Cash did not respond to inquiries by publication time.

news.headline: Robert E. Krimmel appointed President, CEO, and director of Touchmark Bancshares, Inc, holding OTC Pink: TMAK.
news.summary: Touchmark Bancshares, Inc., the parent company of Touchmark National Bank, based in Alpharetta, Georgia, declared on March 27, 2025, that Robert E. Krimmel, also known as Bobby Krimmel, has been designated as the President, CEO, and director of Touchmark National Bank. Touchmark Bancshares, Inc. operates under the stock symbol TMAK on the OTC Pink market. This appointment of Krimmel follows recent announcements regarding the leadership changes at the company.

news.headline: Nonprofit Basta gets grant from Schultz Family Foundation to invest in AI for career advancement.
news.summary: In New York on March 27, 2025, the national nonprofit organization Basta shared news of a significant development. A substantial grant from the Schultz Family Foundation has been secured, providing Basta with the opportunity to enhance its initiatives in addressing systemic underemployment. This financial support will enable Basta to invest significantly in innovative technological resources aimed at combating this issue. The exact amount of the grant was not disclosed in the released information.

news.summary: Humacyte (NASDAQ:HUMA) is gearing up to unveil its quarterly earnings on Friday, March 28, 2025. Analysts are anticipating an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.26. Investors will be looking for Humacyte to exceed this forecast and potentially offer optimistic guidance for future growth. This news is available for further reading on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Xos, a company listed on NASDAQ with the ticker symbol XOS, is preparing to reveal its quarterly earnings on Friday, March 28, 2025. Analysts predict that Xos will announce an earnings per share (EPS) of -$1.24. Investors are eagerly anticipating the announcement, with expectations of Xos potentially exceeding these estimates and offering positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. news.summary: AIM ImmunoTech (AMEX:AIM) is scheduled to announce its quarterly earnings on Friday, November 15, 2024. Analysts are expecting the company to report an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.09. Investors are eagerly awaiting the news, with hopes that AIM ImmunoTech will exceed these expectations and provide optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. This anticipation reflects the interest in the company's performance and potential growth. For more detailed information, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Biopharmaceutical company ImmunoPrecise Antibodies (trading as IPA on NASDAQ) is set to unveil its quarterly earnings on Friday, March 28, 2025. Analysts project an anticipated earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.06. Shareholders are anxiously anticipating the results, optimistic for potential outperformance against estimates and encouraging forward guidance. Stay tuned for further details on the impending announcement.

news.summary: LiqTech Intl, traded on NASDAQ under the symbol LIQT, will release its quarterly earnings report on Friday, March 28, 2025. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.37 for the company. Investors are eagerly anticipating the announcement, with expectations of possible exceeding of estimates and optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. The market is closely watching for any developments. For more details, refer to the complete story on a financial news website.

news.headline: Super League Enterprise (NASDAQ:SLE) to release quarterly earnings on 03/28/2025 with expected EPS of $-0.31. Investors eagerly await the announcement for potential positive guidance.
news.summary: Super League Enterprise (NASDAQ:SLE) is scheduled to announce its quarterly earnings on Friday, March 28, 2025. Analysts are forecasting an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.31 for the company. Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement, with hopes that the company will exceed these expectations and provide optimistic guidance for future performance. Stay tuned for more updates on this highly anticipated event.

news.headline: 50% of tenants cite technical issues as top barrier to in-office attendance - 2025 VTS Global Workplace Report.
news.summary: In New York, VTS, a technology platform connecting real estate stakeholders, has unveiled insights from its Global Workplace Report. This report, based on a survey by an independent research firm and involving hundreds of business leaders worldwide, sheds light on corporate tenant requirements and desires in office spaces. VTS, serving as a unifier for owners, operators, brokers, and clients in the real estate sector, aims to analyze data for a better understanding of workplace trends.

news.headline: Hyatt will release first quarter 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025, with a conference call at 9:00 a.m. CT.
news.summary: Hyatt Hotels Corporation, trading as H on NYSE, will reveal its Q1 2025 financial outcomes on May 1, 2025, before the market opening. A conference call is scheduled at 9:00 a.m. CT on the same day. To tune in, participants can access a live webcast on the company's site at investors.hyatt.com. Following the call, a webcast archive will be available for 90 days on the Hyatt website.

news.headline: CPREX expands into industrial outdoor storage sector with financing for multi-market portfolio through strategic transactions.
news.summary: Clarion Partners Real Estate Income Fund has expanded into the industrial outdoor storage subsector through two significant transactions. This move marks a strategic step for the company, further diversifying its portfolio.

news.headline: UK PM Starmer: UK, French and German Defence Chiefs will meet counterparts in Ukraine.

Maoyan Entertainment reports 2024 annual results, proposes HKD 0.32/share dividend. Revenue of RMB4,082.2m & profit of RMB181.9m, down from 2023. Highest box office contribution for lead distributor of top domestic films in 2024.
news.summary: Maoyan Entertainment, a prominent entertainment platform in China, reported its financial results for 2024, with revenue at RMB4,082.2 million and profit at RMB181.9 million. The company proposed a final dividend of HKD 0.32 per share for the year. Despite a 22.6% decrease in the nationwide box office to RMB42.502 billion, Maoyan's movies had top box office rankings in 2024. The company participated in 63 domestic films, achieving RMB23.2 billion in cumulative box office. Maoyan's focus on refining promotion and distribution capabilities led to successful collaborations with platforms like Baidu and Tencent, enhancing promotional effects. During various movie release periods, Maoyan's lead distributed/produced films ranked highly, earning nominations and awards at prestigious film festivals.

news.headline: H&M reports 3% sales growth to $5.1 billion in Q1, faces margin pressures; gross margin down to 49.1%.
news.summary: H&M, the Swedish fashion retailer, disclosed a 3% rise in Q1 net sales, totaling 55.3 billion Swedish Krona ($5.1 billion). This growth, at 2% in local currencies, was impacted by a 3% decrease in store count from the previous year. Despite obstacles, strong sales were observed in Western, Southern, and Eastern Europe, with notable performance in Germany and Poland. The gross profit for the quarter stood at SEK 27.2 billion, showcasing a gross margin of 49.1%, down from 51.5% year-on-year. The decline was ascribed to external economic factors.

news.headline: Viva Biotech reported 2024 revenue of RMB 1,986.7M, gross profit RMB 687.4M, net profit RMB 222.0M, and adjusted Non-IFRS net profit RMB 314.6M, up 50.6% YOY. CRO business shows a rebound with 1,568 customers, 87.3% revenue from overseas, and 82,716 protein structures delivered. Expanding globally with a focus on AI in drug R&D.
news.summary: Viva Biotech Holdings announced its annual results for the year ended December 31, 2024, with revenue hitting RMB1,986.7 million, gross profit at RMB687.4 million, and net profit at RMB222.0 million, marking a significant turnaround from the previous year. Adjusted Non-IFRS net profit reached RMB314.6 million, representing a 50.6% year-on-year increase. The company saw improvements in its CRO business in the second half of the year, with revenue stabilizing and maintaining a positive growth trend. As of the end of 2024, the company had over 1,500 CRO customers, with revenue primarily coming from overseas regions. Viva Biotech also noted advancements in protein structure analysis, maintaining a leading position in the field. The company has expanded its presence in global markets, particularly in Europe and the U.S., and is focusing on integrating AI in drug R&D to enhance efficiency and success rates.

news.headline: ZyVersa Therapeutics shares FY2024 financials and updates on business.
LEGO offers free creativity workshops: 2025 series starts with 'Friendship'; at select stores and online.
news.summary: The LEGO Group has initiated their 2025 series of free workshops focused on fostering valuable social skills, starting with the 'Friendship' workshop. This workshop is being held at selected LEGO stores throughout North America and can also be accessed online. The event aims to ignite imaginations and promote social interaction.

news.headline: Intuitive released 2 peer-reviewed studies showing Force Feedback can reduce tissue force, improve surgeon performance.
news.summary: A company based in Sunnyvale, California has shared that on March 27, 2025, Intuitive (NASDAQ: ISRG), a prominent player in minimally invasive healthcare and a trailblazer in robotic-assisted surgery, has unveiled the release of two peer-reviewed research papers in Surgical Endoscopy. The studies highlight the innovative Force Feedback technology integrated into the da Vinci 5 surgical system.

news.headline: TEGNA appoints Melissa Zimyeski and Mat Yurow for digital product, growth roles.
news.summary: In the latest report on employment, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.1%. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the same period, surpassing expectations and indicating a positive trend in job growth. The Department of Labor also reported that wages have increased by 3.2% compared to the previous year, showing a rise in average hourly earnings for workers. These latest figures point towards a strengthening labor market and a positive outlook for the economy.

news.headline: NIO announces an upsized HK$4,030M offering of 136.8M shares at HK$29.46 each to close on April 7, 2025 for offshore investors.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, NIO Inc. revealed the pricing details of its increased offering, raising HK$4,030.13 million through the sale of 136,800,000 class A ordinary shares at HK$29.46 each. This move marks a significant milestone for NIO, a major player in the smart electric vehicle market. The Placement Shares were specifically targeted towards non-U.S. investors through offshore transactions under Regulation S of the Securities Act. The Equity Placement is anticipated to conclude around April 7, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements.

news.headline: Hotwire Global forms AI Lab for enhanced AI consulting, development, and tools. Key solutions: Hotwire Spark, agentic AI account.
news.summary: Hotwire Global, a leading global communications and marketing consultancy, revealed the transformation of its AI innovation team into a global AI Lab. This strategic move aims to create AI-driven tools that provide quicker and more intelligent insights, as well as increased impact for clients. The initiative also focuses on promoting AI integration throughout the agency. Among the enhanced solutions unveiled are the AI search discovery platform, Hotwire Spark, and the agentic AI account.

news.headline: TEN Ltd. sees profits in Q4 2024, reveals 36% dwt growth, $4.0 billion revenue target, announces share dividend.
news.summary: The company has announced a significant expansion with the addition of 21 vessels, resulting in a 36% growth in deadweight tonnage. This expansion brings the total proforma fleet to 82 vessels. As a result of this expansion, the minimum contracted revenues are set to double, reaching $4.0 billion.

news.headline: ASGE updates guidelines to include TIF 2.0 and cTIF for GERD; endoscopic therapy proven effective in relieving symptoms.
news.summary: Endoscopic anti-reflux therapy has been acknowledged as a scientifically proven method to alleviate symptoms of gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD). This recognition highlights the effectiveness of endoscopic anti-reflux therapy in offering relief for individuals suffering from GERD symptoms.

news.headline: Edgecore Networks to showcase open infrastructure solutions at OFC25 in San Francisco, highlighting latest generation of innovations.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Edgecore Networks will be presenting their Open Infrastructure Solutions at OFC25. The company will be showcasing the newest models of Simplified Open Infrastructure Solutions, highlighting advancements in technology and innovation in the field.

news.headline: Mercy Health Center in Georgia adopts eClinicalWorks for 49 providers, incorporating AI-powered EHR solutions to improve patient care.
news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks®, the top ambulatory cloud EHR provider, revealed that Mercy Health Center in Georgia has chosen to implement their solutions. The clinic's switch to eClinicalWorks V12, the initial multidimensional and AI-driven EHR system, brings in a comprehensive healthcare solution to cater to its specific requirements. This move is set to drastically improve practice efficiency, elevate patient care standards, and streamline operations effectively.

news.headline: SAIHEAT joins 1CP program to cut energy costs for Bitcoin mining, enhancing operational efficiency.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Singapore-based SAIHEAT Limited (formerly known as SAI.TECH Global Corporation) revealed its involvement in the 1CP (AEP’s Critical Peak) program. This program, targeting energy-intensive industries, aims to lower electricity expenses. SAIHEAT, traded as SAIH and SAITW on NASDAQ, sees this initiative as complementary to its goal of improving operational efficiency and sustainability within the digital asset field.

news.headline: LOBO EV Tech signs $1.57M deal for Ukraine supply, expanding market foothold.
news.summary: LOBO EV Technologies Ltd. has recently revealed a significant supply agreement for the Ukraine market with a staggering worth exceeding $1.57 million.

news.headline: American Rebel Holdings will undergo a 1-for-25 reverse stock split on March 31, 2025. NASDAQ will process round lots (100 shares) with fractional shares rounded up to the nearest whole share.
news.summary: Nashville, TN - March 27, 2025 - American Rebel Holdings, Inc. revealed plans for a reverse stock split of its common stock, par value $0.001 per share, under the symbol NASDAQ: AREB. The split, at a ratio of 1-for-25, is set to take place at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time on March 31, 2025, in accordance with NASDAQ regulations. This move aims to consolidate outstanding shares and streamline the company's stock structure.

news.headline: Annual report released for SELIGSON & CO OMX Helsinki 25 ETF. Includes board of management & auditor information.
Nacha releases Top 50 financial institutions for ACH payments in 2024. Originators 29.7B ACH payments, up 7.4%. Receivers 22B ACH payments, up 10.4%. Total ACH payments exceeded 40B.
news.summary: In 2024, Nacha released its Top 50 rankings for financial institution originators and receivers of ACH payments. The Top 50 originating institutions processed 29.7 billion ACH payments, marking a 7.4% increase from the previous year. They represented 93.8% of the total commercial payments volume on the ACH Network. On the receiving end, the Top 50 institutions reported receiving nearly 22 billion ACH payments in 2024, showing a 10.4% rise from 2023.

news.headline: VEON secures USD 210M term loan from consortium of lenders, including ICBC Standard Bank and GCC banks.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, VEON Ltd. revealed the completion of a successful syndication of a 24-month senior unsecured term loan worth USD 210 million. This loan was secured through a new facility agreement with a group of international lenders, such as ICBC Standard Bank and prominent banks in the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) region.

news.headline: Bitwarden ranked as #2 fastest growing app in Okta's 2025 report, only password manager in top 10 list.
news.summary: Based in Santa Barbara, California, Bitwarden has recently gained recognition as one of the fastest-growing apps included in the Okta Businesses at Work 2025 report. This report showcases workplace and enterprise technology trends using data from the Okta Integration Network (OIN), highlighting customer usage patterns. Bitwarden stands out as the exclusive password management solution listed in the top 10 Fastest Growing Apps tally. This acknowledgment underscores the increasing importance for organizations to enhance authentication procedures and streamline processes.

news.headline: AgriFORCE CEO to speak at NY event on acquisitions at Morgan Stanley, organized by EO, with 100+ CEOs attending.
news.summary: Jolie Kahn, the CEO of AgriFORCE Growing Systems, Ltd., a company listed on NASDAQ with ticker symbol AGRI, has been invited as a panelist to discuss "The Art of the Acquisition; Growing Your Company Using Mergers and Acquisitions". This event, organized by Morgan Stanley, will take place at their New York City offices on March 27, 2025, at 6pm EST. The Entrepreneurs' Organization (EO) New York chapter is producing the event. EO is a global organization with a membership exceeding 20,000 CEOs of companies with revenues exceeding $1 million. Currently, more than 100 CEOs have already signed up to attend the event.

news.headline: AIS appoints Sri Mandava as President of Commercial Business, responsible for all operations and growth plans.
news.summary: A renowned cloud transformation services provider, Applied Information Sciences (AIS), known for its advanced AI solutions and extensive knowledge in Microsoft’s cloud environment, has appointed Sri Mandava as President of Commercial Business. In this role, Sri will oversee all commercial activities at AIS, focusing on formulating and implementing growth strategies, strengthening partnerships, and improving efficiency in sales and delivery processes. This strategic move aims to further enhance AIS's position in the industry, leveraging Sri’s expertise in driving business expansion.

news.headline: Toll Brothers opens luxury home community, Sanderling Bay, in Pawleys Island, SC near the beach. Sales by appointment.
news.summary: On March 27, 2025, Toll Brothers, Inc. declared the inauguration of Sanderling Bay, a luxury home community in Pawleys Island, South Carolina. Situated near the beach, the community offers residents a chance to immerse themselves in a coastal lifestyle. Sanderling Bay is positioned at Petigru Drive and Martin Luther King Road in Pawleys Island and is currently available for sale by appointment at an off-site Sales Center. Toll Brothers, Inc., recognized as the country’s top builder of luxury homes and listed on NYSE as TOL, invites individuals to explore the remarkable living opportunity at Sanderling Bay.

news.headline: Embold Health in Nashville uses conversational AI to guide members to the right provider, reducing costs and improving outcomes.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, Embold Health is leveraging conversational AI technology to direct members to appropriate healthcare providers, leading to decreased costs and enhanced health results. This approach aids in reducing expenses and enhancing overall well-being.

news.headline: Halcones P.M. completes first part of LIFE offering in Canada. US distribution not allowed.
news.summary: This press release is designated for distribution solely within Canada and is not approved for dissemination through United States newswire services or for circulation within the United States.

news.headline: Insurity integrates with Glia for enhanced customer interactions in insurance solutions, across 4 platforms.
news.summary: Insurity, a prominent provider of cloud-based insurance software, has recently broadened its integration with the Insurity Interaction Platform, powered by Glia. This move aims to improve the digital experience for insurers, agents, and policyholders. The enhanced integration will offer seamless communication features within various Insurity software products such as Policy Decisions Evolution, Sure Premium Audit, Sure Loss Control, and Insurity Workers’ Comp Suite. This development is set to benefit a significant number of insurance industry professionals and policyholders.

news.headline: Hyper Photonix to showcase LPO solutions at OFC 2025 in SF. Highlighting 100 Gb/s per lane LPO targeting 800 Gigabit Ethernet.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Hyper Photonix, part of the LPO MSA group, revealed plans to feature its advanced LPO product range at the OFC 2025 event from April 1-3. This demonstration coincides with the LPO MSA's latest announcement of a new specification for Single-Mode Optical Data Transmission, offering speeds of 100 Gb/s per lane with a focus on achieving up to 800 Gigabit Ethernet connectivity.

news.headline: WISeSat to launch second-gen satellite in June, enlarging global presence.
news.summary: In a recent update, it has been reported that the local government has allocated a total of $2.5 million in funds to support small businesses affected by the ongoing pandemic. This financial aid will be distributed to over 500 companies in the area, with each eligible business receiving an average of $5,000 in grants. The aim of this initiative is to help these establishments recover from the economic challenges posed by the crisis and ensure their sustainability in the long run. The application process for the grants is set to begin next week, and businesses are encouraged to apply to receive the much-needed assistance.

news.headline: Sagtec Global expands to Indonesia, targeting $30 million revenue with Speed+ cloud-based smart ordering system.
news.summary: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on March 27, 2025, Sagtec Global Limited (NASDAQ: SAGT), a renowned software solutions provider, revealed its latest move to advance into Indonesia. The company finalized a Master Dealership Agreement with PT Kiwari Asih Solusi, designating Kiwari as the sole master dealer for Sagtec's innovative Speed+ Could Base Smart Ordering System. This partnership marks Sagtec's strategic expansion efforts, catering to the Indonesian market through Kiwari's exclusive representation for Speed+.
